reason: Verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agents list visible in sidebar
Step 2: Found "QA-20260330-183859-k243" agent in sidebar and clicked it — Agent detail page loaded showing the agent status
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle" which meets the requirement
Step 4: Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message appeared in conversation and agent began processing
Step 5: Access request card appeared for GitHub account access — Card showed "Access Requested: GitHub" with a connected GitHub account; selected the GitHub checkbox and clicked "Grant Access"
Step 6a: API request review card appeared for GET /user endpoint — Card showed scope requirements (user and read:user); clicked "Allow" button to approve the request
Step 6b: Agent processed the approved request — Agent transitioned back to "working" state and executed "Get GitHub username via proxy" bash command
Step 7: Agent completed processing and returned response with GitHub username — Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190." (Processing took 39 seconds, well within the 4-minute limit)
Step 8: Took final screenshot of response — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the GitHub username result
